info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' sattAyAM vidyate jYAne vetti vinte vicAraRe ' (Slo. 111) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kfcCrAllabDamaBipretaM yadi kOsalya naSyati tadA nirvidyate so'rTAt pariBagnakramo naraH' (BA0 SAM0 10440) nirvidyate=nirvedamApadyate arTe vizaye labDavye virakto Bavati nirIhaH saMjAyate
'niravidyata DarmAtmA jIvitena vfkodaraH' (BA0 droRa0 13220) jIvite vItaspfho'BUdityarTaH nAtaH paraM jijIvizA'syABUdityaBiprAyaH
'paSyantu duHKitAM kfzRAM sA ca nirvidyatAM punaH' (BA0 vana0 23721) punarnirvidyatAm=BUyo nErASyamApadyatAm
'sANKyayogaviBAgajYo nirvivitsuH' (BA0 saBA0 57) nirvedo yudDoparatiH taM kartumicCanniti nIlakaRWaH
'anirvedaH Sriyo mUlamanirvedaH paraM suKam anirvedo hi satataM sarvArTezvanuvartate' (rA0 51210).. nirvedo nErASyam anirvedastadaBAvaH ASABaNgasya virahaH
'na cAsya jIvite rAjannirvedaH samajAyata' (BA0 strI0 510) jIvite nirvedaH=jijIvizAvirahaH nAtaH paraM jIvitumicCAmIti budDirnAjAyatetyarTaH
'tadA gantAsi nirvedaM Srotavyasya Srutasya ca' (gItA 252) nirvedo viraktirOdAsInyam
'janmanA yastu nirviRRo maraRena taTEva ca ADiBirvyADiBiScEva taM devA brAhmaRaM viduH' (SaNKa0 710) nirviRRo'Kinna ityarTaH pratiBAti
'nirviRRasya padaM karoti hfdaye tasya svatantraspfhA' (paYcata0 1240) nirviRRo virakto'paraktaH svAminyaBakta ityarTaH
'hfzwe jaharza nirvivedAnukUlyataH' (rAja0 6262) atra nirvivide iti tu yuktam videH sattAyAm ityasya tiNNantezu nirvedArTasya darSanAt
'nirvidyati naraH kAmAdanirvidya suKameDate' (BA0 SAM0 1047) nirvidyati nirvidyate virajyate

prayoga.literature_text: nAsato vidyate BAvo nABAvo vidyate sataH
na hi jYAnena sadfSaM pavitramiha vidyate
na SOcaM nApi cAcAro na satyaM tezu vidyate
mAmupetya tu kOnteya punarjanma na vidyate
DarmaparA nityaM tezAM pApaM na vidyate
na pApAnAM vaDe pApaM vidyate SatrusUdana
vIrye na te kaScitsamo vAnara vidyate
na cApi trizu lokezu rAjanvidyeta kaScana
